utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides both physical_health and mental_health with costs and coverage details; also includes enhancement costs and a total_cost. This is fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan marks it as not applicable with no costs provided, so it is not fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. The plan marks it as not applicable with no costs, so not fully specified. 4) additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan states enhancements included within health coverage and provides their costs under health, but the additional_services section itself lacks explicit itemized costs; however, since enhancements and their costs are clearly enumerated elsewhere and referenced here, this can be considered sufficiently specified as enhancement services with costs. 5) total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly total and a breakdown but no annual figure, so it is not fully specified as a complete monthly/annual breakdown.
